Password Generator

Generate strong, secure passwords instantly. Customize length and character types.

Advertisement

How to generate a secure password

Choose your preferred length and character tys, then click Generate. Copy the result and use it immediately.

What makes a strong password?

A strong password is at least 12 characters long and includes uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers and symbols. Avoid using the same password twice.

Is this password generator safe?

Yes. Everything runs locally in your browser. No passwords are ever sent to any server or stored anywhere.

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.
